prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Deep beneath the sparkling ocean waves, in a cozy coral nook, lived a shy little octopus named Ollie. Ollie had eight wonderful, wiggly arms and could change color to match any mood or fancy. He loved his colorful underwater home, but Ollie often felt a tiny bubble of loneliness. You see, Ollie was so shy that he would hide behind his favorite shell or blend in with the nearest rock whenever other sea creatures swam by. More than anything, Ollie wanted to make friends, but he just wasn't sure how to start.
